title: Looking for Custom Reports
excerpt: Hi there! I’m looking to do some custom reports with my data from my Monday boards. Please let me know if this isn’t allowed here - but I am looking for a freelancer to help build scripts to create these reports. Who sho…

posts.author: cnhuffor (Cheyenne Huffor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! I’m looking to do some custom reports with my data from my Monday boards. Please let me know if this isn’t allowed here - but I am looking for a freelancer to help build scripts to create these reports. Who should I reach out to for more information?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cnhuffor

Welcome to the monday.com community!

You’re in the right place here, there will be a few responses to your post with a little more time and you’ll be able to explore your options.

That said, upstream can help. We have an in house team of full stack developers who specialise in integrations and custom requirements. You’ll also have access to our Solutions Engineers.

We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your use case.

Meet with Peta

If you’re based in Europe/USA, please use this link for more accommodating meeting times: international clients - special hours

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @cnhuffor and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

What you are looking to do is well inside the range of abilities that the team at CarbonWeb possesses. Our team likes to take a component-by-component approach so whether your needs are really just on reporting, or a broad range of solutions, we are happy to help!

If you would like to schedule an initial consultation with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you expand on your monday.com environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cnhuffor ,

You’re at the right place.

I am a certified monday professional assisting people to achieve the customize solution through app development.

Let me know if we can connect and discuss the requirements in detail.

You can email me at aquibcs@outlook.com.

Regards,

Aquib Zafar

posts.author: SegunMichael (Oluwasegun Michael Gbadegesin)
posts.cookedHtml: I know of an expert, trusted and certified, who can help you with a solution to this, on Fiverr. He has been of great assistance to my business, you may want to reach out to him, I’m certain he will be ready and available to assist you - https://www.fiverr.com/s2/812d98e528

posts.cookedHtml:
